title: What is PG?
meta: Legal tech service since 2018 · 8 years stable
content:
PG (PG Playground) is a legally registered technology service company based in Colorado, USA, successfully operating since 2018.

Through real orders, we provide online marketing data services for global brands. Our mission: to help merchants verify their order volume, while enabling our users to earn commissions on each verification.

This is a real job that requires no investment. Your deposit is fully refundable working capital.

Users earn commissions by completing assigned order tasks. Tasks are divided by level — higher levels offer higher daily earnings. All tasks come from genuine brand needs, ensuring data accuracy and business compliance.

Earnings are paid based on actual task completion. Withdrawals are available on working days (minimum amount varies by level, no maximum limit).

All deposits serve as working capital for orders and are fully refundable upon withdrawal.

The platform uses automated order review and payment systems to ensure transaction transparency and financial security.

PG is committed to clear rules, refundable funds, and real earnings. We don't promise "get rich quick" — but we strive to provide a stable, sustainable online work opportunity for every diligent user.

For any questions, please contact your manager or the official support team.

title: Why is PG Secure?
meta: Legal registration, financial security, clear rules
desc: Legal, stable, financial security, and verifiable
content:
• Legal Registration — Colorado, USA (2018), publicly accessible address
  • Stable Operation — 8 years of stable activity
  • Financial Security — Deposit is working capital, earnings are work-based
  • Clear Rules — Every record can be audited, earnings are tied to orders
  • Verifiable — Company information can be verified through official channels

⭐ Thousands of people trust PG for daily online income – fully compliant.

title: Deposit Steps
meta: 4 simple steps to fund your account
desc: Contact manager → Transfer → Confirm → Receive credit
content:
1. Contact your manager to get current bank details.
  2. Make the deposit transfer (save a screenshot of the reference number).
  3. Send the screenshot to your manager. Once verified, funds will be credited to your PG account.
  4. The platform supports transfers through CBE (Commercial Bank of Ethiopia), Telebirr, and other local banks.
⚠️ Always verify details with your manager before making any transfer.

title: Withdrawal
content:
• Withdrawal Requests: Monday–Friday (no weekend requests).
  • Funds Arrival Time: 1–4 days (weekend days added).
  • Minimum Withdrawal: Depends on your level (see "Earnings by Level" card).

📱 Steps to Withdraw Your Earnings (via CBE / Telebirr):

  1. Go to «Account» (bottom-right menu).
  2. Click on «Account Balance».
  3. Click the «Withdraw» button below your balance.
  4. Enter the amount (minimum: based on your level) and confirm.
Withdrawal Process Screenshot
📌 All withdrawals are processed in order. Make sure your bank details are correct to avoid delays.

title: Why Deposit?
desc: Your deposit is fully refundable working capital
content:
The deposit is not a "fee" – it's working capital to support your order flow.

Each order requires corresponding funds to complete the process. Your deposit stays in your account as a tool for your daily tasks. Every task you complete earns a commission. When you upgrade or withdraw, the deposit is fully refunded.

✅ PG is a job, not an investment. Completing your daily orders is the basis of your income — you earn by working, not by waiting.

title: Task Steps
desc: Step by step: Add address → Enter order
content:
📍 1. Add your shipping address (once only)
Go to User Center (bottom-right) → Scroll to "Shipping Address" → Enter your address once.

🏠 2. Enter the Task Page
On the home page, click your level button (e.g. "Junior Staff", or your level "VIP 1", "VIP 2", or "VIP 3").

🛒 3. Select the first item and start the order
Select the first item from the list and click "Buy Now".

4. Confirm and submit your order
After selecting "Select All", click "Submit Order". Then click "Submit and Confirm Order".

📍 Shipping Address
📋 Swipe right to see the full flow →

✅ After confirmation, the system starts a timer. When the timer ends, the commission is automatically credited to your balance.

This order is designed to help brands improve their product sales data. No physical product will be shipped to you.

title: Order Guide
meta: Fields, status colors, and batch completion
desc: Entry, fields, red/green colors, batch logic
content:
Two ways to access your orders:
- After entering a task, you'll be directed to "My Orders".
- From the home page, go to "User Center" → "My Orders".

Order Card Fields:
Each card shows: Order Number, Date, Product(s), Total Amount, Commission Earned, Payment Status, Shipping Status, and a timer (Remaining Time / Delivered).

⏰ Expiration Time (exact date and time): Each order card shows the exact expiration date and time (e.g. "Expires: 2026-05-09 10:23:15"). By checking each order's expiration time, you can precisely know when each commission will be credited and when you can enter a new order.

Example: Timers and Expiration Times

🎨 Order Status Colors
🔴 Red order title – Only appears in the "Pending" list. This individual order has completed its timer, but other orders in the same batch are still running.
🟢 Green order title – The order timer is still running.
When all orders in a batch are completed, the entire batch moves to the "Completed" list (where there are no red indicators).

📦 Batch Orders
When you enter 2 or more orders together, they appear as a batch. Different timers may cause some to finish early (turning red) while others remain green and continue running.

💡 Wait patiently during the timer period. After crediting, check your balance in "User Center", then start a new order.

title: Extra Earnings
desc: Referral bonus, downline discounts, security products
content:
In addition to daily commissions, PG offers several additional earning opportunities:

🔹 Referral Bonus (limited activity)

The amount and rules are announced in the official PG discussion group. Contact your manager for current offers.

🔹 Downline Discount (0.2% of product price)

When your downline staff enter daily orders, you earn 0.2% of the product price from each order.
Example: A VIP 1 staff member buys an item worth 5,000 ETB. Your discount = 5,000 × 0.2% = 10 ETB per order. Automatically added to your balance.

🔹 Security Product Orders

Limited quantity orders offered on the platform. Purchasing with your User Center balance yields a high discount. These orders do not affect your daily order limit.
Example: 15-day timer, product price 20,000 ETB, commission 8,000 ETB (much higher than regular orders).

✅ All extra earnings are calculated automatically. Contact your manager for more details and eligibility.

title: Synergy & Growth
meta: Invite → Bonus → Security Products → Upgrade → Team Income → Discounts
desc: How invitations, bonuses, upgrades, team income, and discounts work together
content:
PG's activity system is deeply interconnected — each action fuels the next opportunity:

  1. Invite new members → Once they become regular staff (Junior or above), you earn a Referral Bonus.
  2. Use your bonus → Participate in Security Product Orders that offer higher commissions.
  3. Accumulate earnings → Upgrade to VIP 1, VIP 2, or VIP 3 to unlock higher daily income.
  4. Build your team → When your downline members upgrade (e.g., to VIP 1+), you receive ongoing Team Income and Downline Discounts (0.2% of their order product value).
  5. Grow stronger → More active team members = more passive income, creating a sustainable growth cycle.
💡 Each level deposit is fully refundable when you upgrade to a higher level.

title: Order Block Reasons
meta: Common errors and how to fix them
desc: Why you can't enter orders and what to do
content:
When trying to enter an order as a staff member, you may encounter one of the following error messages. Here's what they mean and how to resolve them:

  1. "This product can only be purchased once per day..."
    You have already added this product to your cart but haven't submitted the order. Go to your Cart and complete the order process. You cannot add the same product again until the existing order is confirmed or canceled.
  2. "Insufficient deposit"
    You are trying to enter more orders than your level's single-processing limit allows. Check "My Orders" for pending orders. Remove some items from your cart so that pending orders + new orders ≤ your limit.
  3. "Your account status does not allow order entry"
    Your account has been reported as inactive because you haven't contacted your manager for a long time. Contact your manager to reactivate your order permissions.
💡 Always check "My Orders" and clear pending items before adding new tasks. If unsure about an error, contact your manager.

title: Letter to Our Team
desc: A real, honest, and sustainable opportunity is what we're here to offer you.
content:
✉️

Dear Friend,

We are here to provide a real, honest, and sustainable opportunity for everyone who desires a better life for themselves and their families.

Since its founding in the USA in 2018, PG has been helping people earn stable income. Over the years we have grown, and now we are delivering our support and services to partners around the world.

PG was built on the value of honest work. Every member succeeds through their own effort. When you invite someone, you're not just making a referral — you're giving a helping hand to that person. The platform simply rewards you for guiding someone to this opportunity.

This is a real win-win cycle: you help someone improve, and they in turn help someone else. Together we build stability, restore trust, and open a reliable path to the future.

The person you invite today is not just a number. They are a father, a mother, or a child's hope.

Let's support each other. Let's build a community where hard work is rewarded, honesty is respected, and everyone finds their place.

Wishing you and your loved ones a bright future. ❤️

title: Platform Rules
content:
1. Staff Conduct
    All staff must interact with each other with respect and professionalism. Insults, harassment, or conflicts are not tolerated.
  2. Honest Registration
    Staff must provide true information when registering. Fake profiles or multiple accounts (one person, one account) are prohibited.
  3. Teamwork and Support
    Senior staff are encouraged to guide and support their downline staff. Positive teamwork helps everyone grow together.
  4. Task Completion
    Complete your assigned daily orders.
    After completing your daily tasks, send a screenshot of one of them to your manager. Failure to report may result in your account being restricted from receiving new tasks. (Contact your manager for assistance.)
  5. Earnings and Rewards
    Earnings include daily wages (Junior Staff: 60 ETB/day, VIP 1: 280 ETB/day, VIP 2: 800 ETB/day, VIP 3: 2,500 ETB/day), referral bonuses, downline discounts (0.2%), and security product discounts. All earnings are paid based on actual task completion.
  6. Referrals and Invitations
    You may invite friends or family, but spam, coercion, or misleading is not allowed. Referral bonuses are paid only after the invited person becomes a regular staff member (Junior or above).
  7. Account Security
    Do not share your password or access with anyone. Report any suspicious activity to support immediately.
  8. Violations
    Violating these rules may result in warnings, suspension of task access, or permanent account termination.
  9. Rule Updates
    PG reserves the right to update these rules to improve the platform. Staff will be notified in advance.
  10. Contacting Support
    For any questions or assistance, please contact your manager or the official support team through official channels.
